testcase.name: runScenario["Validate today appointment filter", "Muhindhar_13-05-2026_Appointment Filter Functionality"](1)
testcase.system-out: @TodayAppointmentFilter Scenario: Validate today appointment filter # src/test/resources/features/AppointmentFilter.feature:13 ✔ Given the user is on the homepage # definitions.addAppointment_Def.the_user_is_on_the_homepage() ✔ And user clicks on receptionist button # definitions.addAppointment_Def.user_clicks_on_receptionist_button() ✔ And user clicks on signin button # definitions.addAppointment_Def.user_clicks_on_signin_button() ✔ Then user should navigate to receptionist dashboard # definitions.addAppointment_Def.user_should_navigate_to_receptionist_dashboard() ✔ And user navigates to Appointment section # definitions.addAppointment_Def.user_navigates_to_appointment_section() ✔ When user clicks on the Today Appointment filter # definitions.AppointmentFilterDef.user_clicks_on_the_today_appointment_filter() ✔ Then user should be able to see today's appointment details # definitions.AppointmentFilterDef.user_should_be_able_to_see_today_s_appointment_details()
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. May 14, 2026 11:15:03 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 148, returning the closest version; found: 147; Please update to a Selenium version that supports CDP version 148

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate upcoming appointment filter", "Muhindhar_13-05-2026_Appointment Filter Functionality"](2)
testcase.system-out: @UpcomingAppointmentFilter Scenario: Validate upcoming appointment filter # src/test/resources/features/AppointmentFilter.feature:18 ✔ Given the user is on the homepage # definitions.addAppointment_Def.the_user_is_on_the_homepage() ✔ And user clicks on receptionist button # definitions.addAppointment_Def.user_clicks_on_receptionist_button() ✔ And user clicks on signin button # definitions.addAppointment_Def.user_clicks_on_signin_button() ✔ Then user should navigate to receptionist dashboard # definitions.addAppointment_Def.user_should_navigate_to_receptionist_dashboard() ✔ And user navigates to Appointment section # definitions.addAppointment_Def.user_navigates_to_appointment_section() ✔ When user clicks on the Upcoming Appointment filter # definitions.AppointmentFilterDef.user_clicks_on_the_upcoming_appointment_filter() ✔ Then user should be able to see upcoming appointments # definitions.AppointmentFilterDef.user_should_be_able_to_see_upcoming_appointments()
testcase.system-err: May 14, 2026 11:15:25 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 148, returning the closest version; found: 147; Please update to a Selenium version that supports CDP version 148

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate old appointment filter", "Muhindhar_13-05-2026_Appointment Filter Functionality"](3)
testcase.system-out: @OldAppointmentFilter Scenario: Validate old appointment filter # src/test/resources/features/AppointmentFilter.feature:23 ✔ Given the user is on the homepage # definitions.addAppointment_Def.the_user_is_on_the_homepage() ✔ And user clicks on receptionist button # definitions.addAppointment_Def.user_clicks_on_receptionist_button() ✔ And user clicks on signin button # definitions.addAppointment_Def.user_clicks_on_signin_button() ✔ Then user should navigate to receptionist dashboard # definitions.addAppointment_Def.user_should_navigate_to_receptionist_dashboard() ✔ And user navigates to Appointment section # definitions.addAppointment_Def.user_navigates_to_appointment_section() ✔ When user clicks on the Old Appointment filter # definitions.AppointmentFilterDef.user_clicks_on_the_old_appointment_filter() ✔ Then user should be able to see old appointments # definitions.AppointmentFilterDef.user_should_be_able_to_see_old_appointments()
testcase.system-err: May 14, 2026 11:15:49 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 148, returning the closest version; found: 147; Please update to a Selenium version that supports CDP version 148
